variant_description: Strict-UD flavor: emits DET and AUX per Universal Dependencies conventions. Produced by classifier-head surgery from the -vdu base plus a short fine-tune on UD_Lithuanian-ALKSNIS.

full_test_bench.protocol: 684-sentence UD_Lithuanian-ALKSNIS gold test, raw-text input, letter-token alignment, VDU-convention slots projection (DET/PRON and AUX/VERB merged; slots = POS family + Case/Gender/Number/Tense/Person/Voice/Degree)

conll18_official.ufeats_f1: 65.89 (by design: the model emits only the accentuation scoring slots, not full UD FEATS)
conll18_official.lemmas_f1: 49.67 (by design: no lemmatizer; form-as-lemma except yra→būti)

lineage: Fully permissive: gold MATAS v3.0 (CC BY 4.0) + gold UD_Lithuanian-ALKSNIS (CC BY-SA 4.0), UD FEATS reconstructed deterministically from MATAS's Jablonskis XPOS, remaining contextual gaps filled by iterated constrained-decoding self-training (no UDPipe or other NC-licensed model anywhere in the lineage), base encoder EMBEDDIA/litlat-bert (CC BY-SA 4.0).
speed_hardware: ONNX Runtime INT8, single CPU thread pool, consumer laptop (measured alongside network-served UDPipe at 605 tok/s)
